message: I am the Evolution Scholar of Lumia. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Solar Kraken into Wild Griffin.
I can evolve Wild Griffin into Celestial Leviathan.
I can evolve Ancient Kraken into Celestial Wyvern.
I can evolve Celestial Wyvern into Astral Kraken.
I can evolve Void Tiger into Frozen Cyclops.
I can evolve Frozen Cyclops into Mystic Specter.
I can evolve Lunar Owlbear into Crystal Kraken.

I can evolve Mystic Leviathan into Astral Owlbear.
I can evolve Astral Owlbear into Infernal Wolf.
I can evolve Shadow Serpent into Storm Chimera.
I can evolve Storm Chimera into Frozen Griffin.
I can evolve Astral Cyclops into Wild Wolf.
I can evolve Wild Wolf into Infernal Griffin.
I can evolve Crystal Hydra into Storm Phoenix.
I can evolve Storm Phoenix into Crystal Djinn.

I can evolve Infernal Wolf into Frozen Titan.
I can evolve Lunar Kraken into Shadow Wyvern.
I can evolve Shadow Wyvern into Shadow Djinn.
I can evolve Celestial Drake into Crystal Leviathan.
I can evolve Crystal Leviathan into Thunder Wyvern.
I can evolve Shadow Titan into Frozen Tiger.
I can evolve Frozen Tiger into Ancient Owlbear.
I can evolve Astral Kraken into Lunar Drake.
I can evolve Lunar Drake into Astral Djinn.
I can evolve Celestial Titan into Astral Leviathan.
I can evolve Astral Leviathan into Celestial Basilisk.
I can evolve Storm Kraken into Frozen Titan.

I can evolve Shadow Drake into Storm Leviathan.
Choose a beast evolution.
